kab:Ad ak-waliɣ deg wass n warim i d-iteddun di Ustriya
kab:Tom d Mary d iselmaden deg sin tura
kab:Yenna-d Tom dakken iwala amsaltu deg beṛṛa
kab:Ur tetturareḍ ara yes-i, aql-ik deg ufus-iw!
kab:Ula d yiwen seg yinelmaden-nni ur d-yewwiḍ deg lawan
